Types

RangeReverseLazySegmentTree[S; F] = ref object
  root: RangeReverseLazySegmentTreeNode[S, F]
  length: int
  merge: proc (x, y: S): S
  default: S
  mapping: proc (f: F; x: S): S
  composition: proc (f, g: F): F
  id: F
